title: disticholiparis cumingii
intro: Disticholiparis cumingii, also known as Cuming's liparis, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to the Philippines. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Disticholiparis cumingii include infusions and decoctions, which are often made by boiling the roots and rhizomes of the plant in water to create a medicinal tea.
